retry_reason: Put wrapper: retrying after a put would double-free or use-after-free.
contract_summary: Put wrapper that releases a reference on a refcounted aarp_entry. When the last reference is dropped (refcount reaches zero), kfree is called to free the object. After calling aarp_entry_put, the caller must not access the aarp_entry pointer as it may be freed. Callers must have previously acquired a reference via a get or initialization.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to decrement the refcount and free the aarp_entry when last reference is dropped. No other logic.

check.reason: The extracted put operation correctly identifies that refcount_dec_and_test is called on &a->refcnt, which is the parameter passed to aarp_entry_put. The access path 'a.refcnt.refs' and type chain 'aarp_entry--refcount_t--atomic_t' are consistent with the code and callee information.
